basic_details.organization_name: Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority (APEDA)
basic_details.short_information: Agricultural and Processed Food Products Export Development Authority (APEDA) has released the official Associate Recruitment 2026 notification under Advt No. PAD-2023-24-000091. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the APEDA Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a maximum age limit of 45 years and possessing qualifications such as Master’s degree in Mass Communications, MBA (Marketing), Masters in Agriculture or Horticulture can submit their applications through Email mode on or before 22 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are available

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Mass Communications/ MBA (Marketing), Masters in Agriculture/ Horticulture
qualification.details: Associate (Trade Fair): Master’s degree in Mass Communications/ MBA (Marketing) from a recognized Institute/ University with Minimum 3 years of relevant work experience post masters’ degree. Associate (Organic Regulation): Masters in Agriculture/ Horticulture with Minimum 3 years of relevant work experience post masters’ degree.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for APEDA Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.agricultural_and_processed_food_products: Master’s degree in Mass Communications/ MBA (Marketing), Masters in Agriculture/ Horticulture

content_sections.heading: APEDA Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the APEDA Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download APEDA Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: APEDA Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Associate (Trade Fair): Master’s degree in Mass Communications/ MBA (Marketing) from a recognized Institute/ University with Minimum 3 years of relevant work experience post masters’ degree. Associate (Organic Regulation): Masters in Agriculture/ Horticulture with Minimum 3 years of relevant work experience post masters’ degree.

content_sections.heading: APEDA Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age relaxation rules will be as per government norms.

rows.event: Last Date of Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for APEDA Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for APEDA Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the APEDA Associate positions is 22nd July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Associate post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Associate post in APEDA Recruitment 2026. These are divided into two specific roles as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Associate (Trade Fair) post?
faq.answer: For the Associate (Trade Fair) position, candidates need a Master’s degree in Mass Communications or MBA (Marketing) with at least 3 years of relevant work experience post-master's.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Associate positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Associate positions will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 80,000 to Rs. 1,05,000.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Associate posts is 45 years. Age relaxation may be applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application process for APEDA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process involves sending a complete application with all required documents via email to the designated address before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for APEDA Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) to apply for the APEDA Associate positions.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Associate posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Associate positions in APEDA will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Associate positions in APEDA is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where is APEDA located?
faq.answer: APEDA is located in New Delhi, with the specific address being 110016.
